content: Premier Choice International is know for: THE TRUE AND ONLY INTERNATIONAL REAL ESTATE DEVELOPER IN BAHRIA TOWN, DHA ISLAMABAD. Premier Choice International is a renowned real estate development firm that was founded in 2011 by Amran Zia in Dubai, UAE. Premier Choice International has been in the real estate industry for more than twelve years and has been conducting its operations in multiple real estate markets that include Dubai, New York City, Canada, and Islamabad. Extensive International Experience Quality Control Timely Project Delivery

We have continually demonstrated Investment Growth, Construction Reliability, and Delivery Excellence through our extensive background in international markets. Our Innovative and Growth- Focused Approach has always left a positive impact in our Projects’ communities. With the vision of Value Creation and Community Building, we continually strive to deliver Superior Investment Returns and an ultimate leisurely living experience. INVESTMENT PHILOSOPHY VERTICALLY INTEGRATED OUR SERVICES Investment Management STEP 1 Full Rental & Leasing Assistance STEP3 Design, Project & Development Management STEP 2 Property Facilities Management STEP 4 Our Investment Philosophy & Corporate strategy is: VALUE CREATION INNOVATION GROWTH FOCUSED APPROACH DELIVERY EXCELLENCE COMMUNITY BUILDING

Newest commercial hub of the twin cities consisting of over 4 Million+ Sq.ft. of commercial and residential development. The development is undertaken at a realistically feasible but grand scale which lies in the prime of DHA Phase 1. At Orchard Boulevard we give you a card-based community. The surrounding hill areas will be beautified with trees and plants. The locality offers valley views and higher floors will offer panoramic views of the city. Our community offers resource efficient residential spaces which will feature proper waste management by DHA, recycling centers, and water reservoirs. COMMUNITY LIVING 4,000,000+ SQ.FT. OF COMMERCIAL & RESIDENTIAL SPACE BUILDINGS BUSINESS PARK

LOCATED AT: Main Link Road, DHA 1, Islamabad 1,000,000 Grand Orchard is an architectural marvel in the heart of DHA Phase 1, Islamabad. It offers luxury open-plan apartments with spacious balconies and terraces, providing breathtaking views of the city and a seamless blend of comfort and elegance. In addition to its residential spaces, Grand Orchard features a spacious mall that caters to shopping and entertainment needs. Its prime location ensures residents enjoy the convenience of urban living within a tranquil and well-planned environment. SQUARE FEET ARCHITECTURAL MARVEL COMMERCIAL HUB 300 METERS ACCESS TO G.T ROAD KEY LOCATION OF DHA one of the most in-demand areas in twin cities 9+ PROJECTS in new community situated in the heart of Dha 1 with less traffic & noise pollution to DHA 1 main gate 300 METERS drive away from Fauji Foundation Hospital in less than a minute
UNVEIL THE ESSENCE OF LUXURY, EXPERIENCE EXCELLENCE IN EVERY DETAIL

CRAFTING TIMELESSLY With its cutting-edge design and innovative amenities, Grand Orchard is the new talk of the town! BUILDING STRUCTURE 4 Basement Parking Floors + G + 18 Floors 300 03 FEET HEIGHT BUILDINGS At Grand Orchard, we are set to offer spacious and innovative living through our modern open floor plans. With a continual focus on community planning, this development by Premier Choice International will elevate the scope of amenities and design which is being offered to investors in North Pakistan. Our residential apartments will feature panoramic views of the capital and sleek interiors to redefine vertical living in Pakistan. Along with this, the Grand Orchard Mall has been designed according to consumer preferences to get you the highest return on your investment! At Premier Choice International we are striving to accomplish the highest standard of community development in the capital right from the heart of DHA, Phase 1, Islamabad. Consisting of open-plan apartments with breathtaking views from terraces, with the added benefit of the best amenities, retail stores, and dining options right in the vicinity. CARD BASED COMMUNITY GRADE AAA PARKINGS ECOLOGICAL APPROACH LUXURIOUS MALL 4 LAYERED SECURITY GYM & SPA RESTAURANTS SHOPS & OFFICES SWIMMING POOL KIDS PLAY AREA

Grand Orchard is poised to become the first and most unique commercial hub in DHA Phase 1, Islamabad, with its four-floor shopping mall offering an unmatched retail experience. The mall is set to include a lush food court, high-end outlets, and hypermarts, catering to diverse shopping and dining needs. With its distinct and separate entrances, the mall ensures seamless accessibility without inconveniencing the residents of Grand Orchard, providing a harmonious blend of luxury living and premium retail. The mall’s design features high ceilings, modern spaces, and a thoughtfully laid-out floor plan, all aiming to maximize the benefits for business owners and shoppers. This strategic design enhances the shopping experience and creates an ideal environment for businesses to thrive. Whether you’re looking for a sophisticated shopping spree or a delightful dining experience, Grand Orchard’s Mall offers it all, setting a new standard for commercial excellence in the region. REFINED SHOPPING MALL
DISCOVER A UNIQUE WORLD OF SHOPPING AND DINING
Hyper Market Enhancing your quality of life with seamless access to everyday necessities, all in one convenient hypermart.
EXPERIENCE TRANQUILITY WITH SCENIC ROOFTOP LOUNGES

Swimming Pool Fitness Gym A state-of-the-art fitness center with high-end equipment and services for athletes, coaches, and the community is located in central Islamabad Our infinity pool is a unique concept as it seamlessly combines the surrounding aesthetics and scenery to create an exceptional experience.

FEATURING Open Floor Plans: Breath-taking Views: Modern Interiors: The apartments provide spacious interiors as your home comfortably blends elements of functionality and luxury. With lush balconies and vast windows, your home is a haven that connects you with the vibrant city landscape. A blend of minimalism and sleek fixtures ensures that your home makes you feel like you are on top of the world. Hilton Garden Inn is introducing a refined international standard of hospitality to Islamabad with its luxurious hotel suites in Grand Orchard’s Tower A. This prestigious addition brings an exciting opportunity to the Grand Orchard community, perfectly embodying Premier Choice International’s vision of creating hospitable, world-class communities. With its blend of comfort, style, and global expertise, Hilton Garden Inn enhances the lifestyle experience, making Grand Orchard a standout destination in DHA Phase 1. Guests will enjoy modern amenities, exceptional service, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere that Hilton Garden Inn is renowned for worldwide. Each suite is meticulously designed to provide a serene retreat, combining contemporary aesthetics with functional elegance. Whether for business or leisure, this luxurious hotel promises an unforgettable stay in the heart of Islamabad.
